resume.raw_text:
=== Devin Rhodie - Resume.pdf ===
Devin Rhodie 

516-402-0127  •  dkr1418@rit.edu  •  www.linkedin.com/in/devin-rhodie-858bb5267 

OBJECTIVE 

Software Engineering student seeking a full-time co-op/internship in software 
development or systems design for Spring/Summer 2026.   

EDUCATION  Rochester Institute of Technology, Golisano College of Computing and Information Sciences 

Bachelor of  Science, Software Engineering Major  
·  GPA: 3.0 | Awarded Dean’s List (Spring 2025)| ENGAGE Scholarship (Merit-Based)  
·  Relevant Coursework: Software Design for computing systems, Web engineering, 
Human-centered requirements and design, Software process and project management, 
Software testing, Intro to software engineering, Engineering of software subsystems, 
Cybersecurity, Database systems, Computer systems concepts 

           Anticipated  May 2027 

SKILLS 

Technical Skills:  
Programming Languages: Python, Java, C++, C#, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, SQL, API development 
and Integration, object-oriented design  
Operating Systems: Windows, Linux(Ubuntu), macOS 

PROJECT  Musical Instrument Digital Interface (MIDI) App    
EXPERIENCE  ·  Created a cross device application handling MIDI protocols for real time music playback.  

Jan 2025 - Apr 2025 

·  Designed C++ software to control MIDI playback with Play, Pause, Stop, and Next functions. 
·  Implemented dual-mode input system supporting both terminal commands and physical 
buttons 
·  Integrated LED feedback and event-driven state handling for real-time playback control. 
Oct 2024 - Nov 2024 
COMIX GUI application 
·  Built a GUI-based comic book management app with tools for searching, adding, and editing 
comics. 
·  Implemented import/export functionality using  CSV/JSON/XML and persistent data storage. 
·  Collaborated in a team to combine different subsystem designs into a functional application. 

EXPERIENCE  RIT SCOOP 

Remote 
Aug 2025- Dec 2025 

Software Engineer Intern 
· Contributed to the development and maintenance of SCOOPortal, a web application 
supporting the RIT SCOOP program for students and faculty. 
· Refactored complex React modal components to improve usability, state handling, and error 
management across multiple user roles. 
· Led UI debranding efforts, updating styles, labels, and more for new platform requirements. 
· Implemented and enhanced confirmation modals to prevent accidental data loss and improve 
user feedback during form submission workflows. 
UpperLine Code 
Software Engineer Intern 
·  Created a web application using HTML and JavaScript to display local recycling centers.  
·  Collaborated with a partner, focusing on frontend development. 
·  Designed a user-friendly interface and integrated location based search functionality. 
·  Presented the project to a cohort of peers, explaining the development process and features. 

Remote  
 July 2023 - Aug 2023

projects.name: MIDI App
projects.description: Created a cross-device application handling MIDI protocols for real-time music playback. Designed C++ software with Play, Pause, Stop, and Next controls. Implemented dual-mode input (terminal + physical buttons) and integrated LED feedback with event-driven state handling.

projects.name: COMIX GUI Application
projects.description: Built a GUI-based comic book management app with search, add, and edit tools. Implemented import/export using CSV/JSON/XML with persistent data storage. Collaborated in a team to integrate multiple subsystem designs.
